title: Add auth middleware to protect routes
description: Implement auth middleware that extracts Bearer token from Authorization header, returns 401 for missing/invalid/expired tokens, attaches req.user={userId, email} on success, and works as framework-agnostic middleware with a protected route example demonstrating usage. Unit tests cover missing header, malformed token, expired token, and valid token scenarios.
existing_patterns: src/auth/_auth.ts: extractBearerToken utility parses Authorization header
src/auth/withAuth.ts: Next.js route handler wrapper with JWT verification and role checking
src/middleware/request-logger.ts: Next.js middleware factory pattern using NextRequest/NextResponse
src/middleware/auth-middleware.ts: createAuthMiddleware factory with rate limiting and session validation
